message:
feat(mcp): add mission MCP tools surface with robot parity [ft-1i2ge.5.3]

Implements 5 MCP mission tools mirroring the CLI/Robot Mode commands:
- wa.mission_state: query lifecycle, assignments, counters with filtering
- wa.mission_explain: legal transitions, failure catalog, assignment context
- wa.mission_pause: pause active mission with checkpoint creation
- wa.mission_resume: resume paused mission, restore prior state
- wa.mission_abort: abort mission, cancel in-flight assignments

Includes helper functions for mission file resolution, loading,
saving, lifecycle transition mapping, and assignment state derivation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
